query:
SELECT ac.id, ac.assessmentPdiId, ac.competenciaId, c.name as competenciaNome, ac.peso, ac.nivelAtual, ac.metaFinal, ac.metaCiclo1, ac.metaCiclo2, ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino
FROM assessment_competencias ac
JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId
WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId IN (210001, 210002)
ORDER BY ac.assessmentPdiId, ac.id
command:

FROM assessment_competencias ac
JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId
WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId IN (210001, 210002)
ORDER BY ac.assessmentPdiId, ac.id
